title: Masks of Terror
description: Masks of Terror is a mod about different masks and powers
body:
Masks of Terror: 

Masks of Terror is a mod all about different masks and powers, there will be all kinds of different masks in the final version but atm there are only 7 representing the 7 deadly sins of the world. All Masks will have both pros and cons but be careful if you ever put on a mask you'll be cursed to forever wear a mask, failing to wear a Mask after this will result in a lot of pain but I'm not evil so when you die there will be a brief "Grace Period" where you won't take any damage while searching for you stuff but if you haven't found the mask after the "Grace Period" has ended we all know what happens then.

Type "/mot help" in-game for help with mod/user configuration.

Main page on CurseForge.

 

Mask of Wrath:

The Mask of Wrath gives the user enhanced powers in dire situations, but leaves the user despite what health they previously on 1/2 a heart.

 

Mask of Envy:

The Mask of Envy gives the user enhanced powers if the target entity has more health than the user, but if the user has more health than the target entity the user is cursed for a few seconds.

 

Mask of Greed:

The Mask of Greed gives the user any enchantment they wish onto whatever tool they are holding, but for every enchantment you make you loose 1/2 a heart of your max-health.

 

Mask of Sloth:

The Mask of Sloth gives the user Strength II but also gives them Slowness I.

 

Mask of Lust:

The Mask of Lust forces any targets to face the user but curses the user if they kill 2 entities of the same kind in a row. (cooldown: 2400 ticks)

 

Mask of Gluttony:

The Mask of Gluttony gives the user Strength II but also gives them Hunger I.

 

Mask of Pride:

The Mask of Pride gives the user enhanced powers if the user has more health than the target entity, but if the target entity has more health than the user the user is cursed for a few seconds.
